gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, with healthcare providers showcasing community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, during which healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; meanwhile, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
